M-039.NAME: session-security-hardening
M-039.owns: Safe auth/session hardening for user and admin frontends after UI cleanup, with compatibility-first migration away from fragile client token storage

exports.flow-user-session-smoke: User login, refresh, logout, and 401 recovery smoke path
exports.flow-admin-session-smoke: Admin login, refresh, logout, and role-gate smoke path
exports.compat-auth-transition: Rollback-aware transition contract for frontend auth storage behavior

constraints.constraint-1: Do not break login, register, refresh, logout, Telegram auth, or admin role checks.
constraints.constraint-2: Any auth storage change must include rollback and explicit browser storage verification.
constraints.constraint-3: This phase must run after compact UI flows are stable enough to test real auth behavior.

M-039.hotspot: H-025: Session hardening must not break login/register/refresh/logout compatibility during frontend simplification
